settings.text: At ANIMETAT, we turn your love for anime into wearable art. Our high-quality, temporary tattoos let you showcase your favorite characters without the long-term commitment. Safe, eco-friendly, and designed for all skin types, our tattoos give you the freedom to change your look whenever you want. Our mission is simple: to give you the freedom to tattoo your beloved anime on your body and to create a community where creativity and individuality are celebrated. We’re more than just a tattoo brand – we’re a movement of anime enthusiasts who believe in the power of art to connect, inspire, and express.

Fueled by countless late-night anime marathons and a deep passion for body art, our journey began with a shared obsession: combining anime and tattoos. Like many fans, we loved the idea of wearing our favorite characters and epic scenes on our skin. But we also completely understood the hesitation that comes with permanent ink. Not everyone is ready to make a lifelong commitment to a single design. It was this realization that set us on a path to find a better way.

After years of dreaming and planning, we decided to create ANIMETAT—a brand that lets you showcase your love for anime through high-quality, semi-permanent tattoos. Our mission was simple: to give fellow anime enthusiasts the freedom to express their fandom without the permanence.What began as a small project has quickly grown into a thriving community. Our first designs were met with excitement, and it wasn’t long before we started shipping orders around the world. We realized that there were countless fans like us, eager to display their love for anime in a bold, yet flexible way.

At ANIMETAT, we’re all about combining our love for anime with our commitment to quality. Every tattoo we create is made with non-toxic, eco-friendly materials, ensuring they’re safe for all skin types and vibrant enough to stand out. We want our customers to feel confident and excited about their tattoos, knowing they can change up their look.
